page_metadata.biotools__summary: A python package BOOME, known as BOOsting algorithm for Measurement Error in binary responses and high-dimensional covariates, is used to select informative variables and estimate associated parameters with correction of misclassification in responses and measurement error effects in covariates simultaneously.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A python package BOOME, known as BOOsting algorithm for Measurement Error in binary responses and high-dimensional covariates, is used to select informative variables and estimate associated parameters with correction of misclassification in responses and measurement error effects in covariates simultaneously.
